He also discovers which former dictator once spent Christmas in the city.

programme.desc: Documentary exploring the career of the much-loved former England, Barcelona and Newcastle United manager. programme.title: MoviePass, MovieCrash
programme.desc: The story of MoviePass, the company that offered cinema tickets at a discounted rate. It was a movie lover's dreaam, but in just eight years it went from being the fastest-growing subscription service since Spotify to total bankruptcy. This documentary chronicles the visionary mission of its co-founders, its early success and how it finally failed due to mismanagement and corporate greed.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, Maine; they have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks, but they may not be able to overcome the challenges and finish the cabin before winter comes.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and the Cabin Masters team attempt to restore a family camp that sisters Charlene Andersen and Pennilyn Dudley fondly recall many stories of from the last 50 years.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A family loves their cozy, hilltop camp even though it lacks some basic amenities that make year-round visits difficult; the Cabin Masters employ all their skills to transform this unfinished gem from driveway to dock.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Two newlyweds call on the Cabin Masters to expand the 1957 Great Pond cabin they inherited to include enough space for their family, which includes three children, their spouses and six grandchildren.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
